advertiseAddresses.title: Advertise addresses
advertiseAddresses.description: Externally reachable host:port addresses published to Access status. Multiple addresses are supported.

mode.title: Backend mode
mode.description: Selects how SSH streams reach target containers.

x-enum.name: Kubernetes API server
x-enum.description: Uses pods/exec and pods/portforward through the Kubernetes API server. This is the default and requires no node component.

x-enum.name: Node-local CRI
x-enum.description: Sends streams over mTLS to kube-ssh-node on the target node, then uses CRI. High-volume data bypasses the API server and never falls back to the Kubernetes backend.

runtimeEndpoints.title: CRI runtime endpoints
runtimeEndpoints.description: Candidate CRI v1 Unix endpoints checked in order. Leave empty to probe common containerd, CRI-O, K3s, K0s, and cri-dockerd paths.

existingSecret.title: Existing node mTLS Secret
existingSecret.description: Uses an operator-managed Secret containing ca.crt, tls.crt, and tls.key. The same certificate is used by the node server and gateway client; its SAN must cover the Node server name and its common name must match expectedClientName. Leave empty to let Helm generate and preserve the credentials.
